phrases.phrase: Μετὰ δὲ τὴν μετοικεσίαν Βαβυλῶνος Ἰεχονίας
phrases.translation: After the deportation of Jeconiah to Babylon.
phrases.summary: The text sets a time context by referring to the deportation (transfer) of Jeconiah to Babylon, indicating that what follows happens after that event.
Jeconiah is described as having a child: he fathered Salathiel.
The text then states that Salathiel fathered another person: Zorobabel.
